[F. No. Z-20018/4/2002-CPA) R. K. VAISH, Jt. Sccy. Note :—The notification constituting the Loss of Ecology (Prevention and Payments of Compensation) Authority for the State of Tamil Nadu, was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide numbers S.0. 671 (E), dated the 30th September, 1996 and subsequently amended vide S.0. 710(E), dated the 12th October, 1996; 8.0. 550 (E), dated the 15th July, 1998; 5.0. 823(E), dated the 16th September, 1998; 5.0. 621(E), dated the 2nd August, 1999; 5.0. 972(K), dated the 28th September, 2001; S.0. 130(E), dated the 28th January, 2002: $.0. 348(E), dated the 28th March, 2002; S.0. 1044(E), dated the 27th September, 2002; $.0. 1063(E), dated the 20th September, 2004; S.0.1432(1), dated the 31st December, 2004; S.0. 1639 (E), dated the 29th September, 2006; $.0. 50(E), dated the 17th January, 2007; $.0. 506 (E), dated, 31st March, 2007; 5.0, 1007 (1), dated the 22nd Junc, 2007: $.0. 1556 (E), dated the 17th September, 2007 and S.0. 1677 (E), dated the 28th September, 2007.
